author: kṛṣṇa⋅dāsa
verses:
advaita⋅ācārya gosāñi sākṣāt īśvara
jā̐hāra mahimā nahe jīvera gocara

mahāviṣṇu sṛṣṭi karena jagadādi⋅kārya
tā̐ra avatāra sākṣāt advaita ācārya

jagat⋅maṅgala advaita, maṅgala⋅guṇadhāma
maṅgala⋅caritra sadā, ‘maṅgala’ jā̐ra nāma

kamala⋅nayanera te̐ho, jāte ‘aṅga’, ‘aṁśa’
‘kamalākṣa’ bali’ dhare nāma avataṁsa

mahāviṣṇura aṁśa⋅advaita guṇadhāma
īśvare abheda, teñi ‘advaita’ pūrṇanāma

bhakti⋅upadeśa vinu tā̐ra nāhi kārya
atoeva nāma haila ‘advaita ācārya’

advaita ācārya⋅īśvarera aṁśavarya
tā̐ra tattva⋅nāma⋅guṇa, sakali āścarya

jā̐hāra tulasīdale, jā̐hāra huṅkāre
svagaṇa sahite caitanyera avatāre

jā̐ra dvārā kaila prabhu kīrtana pracāra
jā̐ra dvārā kaila prabhu jagat nistāra

ācārya gosāñira guṇa⋅mahimā apāra
tā̐hāra caraṇe mora koṭi namaskāra

jaya jayādvaitācārya caitanyera ārya
svacaraṇe bhakti deha’ jayādvaitācārya
en_translation:
Advaita Ācārya is directly the Supreme Lord. His glory is not comprehensible to the ordinary soul.

Lord Mahā-Viṣṇu performs the activities of creation of the universe. His incarnation is directly Advaita Ācārya.

Advaita is the auspiciousness of the world and the abode of auspicious qualities. His character is always auspicious, and His Name is also "Auspicious."

He is the one with lotus eyes, in whom there is both the "limb" and the "portion" of the Lord. He bears the Name "Kamalākṣa" as an ornament.

Advaita is a portion of Lord Mahā-Viṣṇu and is the abode of all qualities. He is non-different from the Supreme Lord; therefore His full Name is "Advaita."

Without teaching devotion, He has no activity. Therefore, His Name became "Advaita Ācārya."

Advaita Ācārya is the best portion of the Supreme Lord. His spiritual identity, Name, and qualities are all wonderful.

By His offering of Tulasī leaves and by His roar, Lord Caitanya incarnated with His own associates.

Through Him the Lord propagated congregational chanting and delivered the world.

The qualities and glory of Advaita Ācārya are boundless. At his feet, I offer millions of obeisances.

All glories, all glories to Advaita Ācārya, the venerable associate of Lord Caitanya! Please grant me devotion at your feet.
